scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,ADMIN,RESTAURANT,MOBILE" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:restaurant" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install && cd ../restaurant && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
